nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I used a text to image model to help me create reference for anatomy

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use LLMs for things like writing copy and admin work such as drafting/editing emails

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: 100% me. The text to image model requires a lot of tweaking to get right

nodes.label: AI as quick information lookup tool
nodes.grounding_span: Finding reference or stock images takes a fraction of the time

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.grounding_span: Many businesses are fine settling with what an LLM or a text to image model spits out without any further editing by a human. This means fewer jobs and increased competition

nodes.label: AI as evolving tool requiring human adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's important for me to use and learn about the AI tools as they develop so I can know what aspects they struggle with that I as a human can still generate value

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I'm coming in with an idea and just using the model to help me execute that vision

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Finding reference or stock images takes a fraction of the time

nodes.label: Career sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: This means fewer jobs and increased competition

nodes.label: Continuous learning and adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's important for me to use and learn about the AI tools as they develop

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI as research tool
nodes.grounding_span: a text to image model paired with OpenPose and ControlNet allows me to get closer to a finished result

nodes.label: Resistance to AI replacing human control
nodes.grounding_span: Many businesses are fine settling with what an LLM or a text to image model spits out without any further editing by a human

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I hope AI will become more capable at handling those aspects of my work so I can focus on the creative side

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI as cheating vs. evolution
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's important for me to use and learn about the AI tools as they develop so I can know what aspects they struggle with that I as a human can still generate value

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I'll iterate 20-50 times to get an image that is maybe 50% of the way to what I'm envisioning

nodes.label: Strategic adaptation — uses AI for specific tasks while maintaining core skills
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's important for me to use and learn about the AI tools as they develop so I can know what aspects they struggle with that I as a human can still generate value
